getangle

gunfolds.tools.dbn2latex.getangle(A, B)[source]

When A and B are two angles around the clock returns an angle of the line that is connecting them.

Parameters

  • A –

  • B –

Returns

returns an angle of the line that is connecting them.

Return type

gprint

gunfolds.tools.dbn2latex.gprint(G, mtype='obs', bend=5, curve=5, R=1, layout=None, scale=5)[source]
